channel.title: bloggy blog on alexis lavail
channel.description: Recent content in bloggy blog on alexis lavail

item.title: Kungsängslilja
item.description: A pretty picture today, with one of my favourite flower: kungsängslilja in Swedish (and a great name in French: Fritillaire pintade). It is the official flower of Uppland province, which encompasses Uppsala.

item.title: Lappis humlegården
item.description: As a homebrewer, I am interested in the four basic ingredients that we combine to make beer: water malt hops yeast The tap water in Stockholm comes from lake Mälaren and is excellent. Malt I can buy locally from Swedish maltsters (e.g Warbro Kvarn). Amazing yeasts can be found too, like the Norwegian kveik yeast that can be dryed & re-used from batch to batch. What about hops though?

item.title: Covid
item.description: Well, I am sick this week, so nothing to be seen here. Come on, move along :-).

item.title: It's a start
item.description: Welcome to this blog! Hello world I guess. Why this blog? Well, thanks for asking. You provide some sort of peer-pressure so that I regularly write something. I suck at writing, and I dislike it. So this will be a good kick in the butt. Expect some science, much nonsense, some landscapes, beer-brewing and other misc. How often should I write? How often will I write? Who knows … But at least a post a week should be good, non?
